approach: Complete induced-core embedding and row-lex boundary-pullback enumeration for supplied source records 21 and 12, with complement record 21 as a negative control.

strategy.mechanism: Enumerate every induced embedding of the fixed record-21 order-30 core, expand every tied-row-compatible residual order, and deduplicate exact 426-bit boundary pullbacks before emitting blocks.

hypothesis: Every induced embedding and row-lex boundary pullback for source records 21 and 12 can be enumerated by two independent implementations within 30 seconds and 1 GiB per case, with identical exact streams and no embedding in complement record 21.
discriminating_test: Run custom graph6/bitset DFS and NetworkX graph6/VF2 exhaustive enumeration on records 21 and 12 plus complement record 21, then replay every map and vector with a third checker and two exact R(5,5) graph checkers.

search_efficiency.naive_space: C(42,12)=11,058,116,888 deleted residual sets per host before induced-isomorphism and core-automorphism work.
search_efficiency.chosen_mechanism: Search adjacency-consistent injections with packed domains while retaining an independent exhaustive VF2 implementation and third pairwise replay checker.
search_efficiency.estimated_or_measured_savings: Custom enumeration visited 31,255–32,249 DFS states per host and took 3.58–3.96 seconds. NetworkX took 11.76–26.76 seconds. The worst observed positive-host sum projects to 5.5979 core-hours for 656 hosts, but this is not a bound.
search_efficiency.soundness_guard: Complete mapping/vector stream comparison, pairwise induced-map replay, complete tied-row replay, host-pullback equality, historical controls, empty complement control, two exact five-set checkers, and rejected edge/map mutations.

space_reduction.represented_space_before: 2^66*C(2^30+11,12) row-sorted assignments in the fixed record-21 boundary
space_reduction.eliminated_or_quotiented: No assignment was blocked; exact future pullbacks were classified for two supplied source classes.
space_reduction.coverage_scope: All embeddings and row-lex residual orders for supplied source records 21 and 12; complement record 21 is the negative control.
space_reduction.soundness_basis: Two implementations emitted identical complete streams and a third checker replayed every pullback.
space_reduction.remaining_unknown: The other 654 supplied host representations, hosts with tied rows or many embeddings, unknown order-42 classes, unsupplied boundary solutions, and R(5,5).
space_reduction.next_bulk_elimination: Generate and reconcile all 656 supplied-host pullbacks before emitting a deduplicated block set.

tactical_learning.prediction: Both positive cases finish below 30 seconds with exact agreement, both historical vectors occur, and complement record 21 is empty.
tactical_learning.observation: Each positive host has exactly two embeddings. Record 21 produces one unique vector; record 12 produces two. Complement record 21 has none. All residual rows were distinct and every replay control passed.
tactical_learning.surprise: Record 21's two embeddings collapse to one vector, while record 12's remain distinct.
tactical_learning.bottleneck_update: The bottleneck is now a checkpointed, fail-closed 656-host census and unknown worst-case embedding or tied-row multiplicity.

reusable_assets.name: Independent replay checker
reusable_assets.use: Map, tied-row, pullback, mutation, and graph-property validation

constraints_learned.constraint: A sound supplied-class block must include every induced core embedding and every residual ordering within tied rows.
constraints_learned.scope: The fixed record-21 core and current row-lex boundary encoding.
constraints_learned.evidence: Pullback correspondence and exact two-record replay.

tactical_learning.next_discriminator: Run a checkpointed complete 656-host reconciliation, stopping on mismatch, limit breach, or excessive tied expansion.

prior_art_check.exact_delta: A deterministic certificate of every row-lex boundary pullback of each supplied control into one fixed-core SAT boundary.
prior_art_check.duplicate_risk: This can exclude only rediscoveries of supplied controls inside one boundary; it cannot prove corpus completeness.
prior_art_check.comparison_test: Records 21 and 12 reproduce retained supplied-class models while complement record 21 remains empty under two exact methods.

field_progress_assessment.closest_prior_result: McKay–Radziszowski delete-three/extend closure and common-subgraph searches over the supplied controls.
field_progress_assessment.measurable_improvement: Four exact embedding occurrences and three unique boundary vectors fully reconciled for two supplied source classes.
field_progress_assessment.independent_validation: A third checker replayed every map/vector; two exact five-set checkers accepted all three labelled graphs; two corruptions were rejected.
field_progress_assessment.remains_unproved: No complete class block, novel order-42 graph, K43 witness, boundary exclusion, corpus completeness result, or improved Ramsey bound.
field_progress_assessment.route_recommendation: Continue only through the checkpointed complete-corpus census.

summary: The two-record feasibility gate passed with exact three-way validation. No block was emitted and 43 <= R(5,5) <= 46 is unchanged.
rationale: Exact stream agreement and independent replay establish the mechanism only on its declared two-record scope; the unprocessed 654 hosts forbid any class-exclusion claim.
claims: Source record 21 has exactly two fixed-core embeddings producing one unique row-lex vector.
Source record 12 has exactly two fixed-core embeddings producing two unique row-lex vectors.
Complement record 21 has no induced embedding of the fixed core.
Both enumerators and the independent replay checker agree on this scope.
next_steps: Generalize both enumerators into atomic host-by-host checkpoint drivers.
Submit the 328-source-plus-328-complement reconciliation to the checkpointed lab.
Only after complete reconciliation, deduplicate and replay a global block stream before considering residual SAT.
experiments: .proof-experiments/20260721-182632-8096f2: custom enumeration passed in 11.576 seconds total
.proof-experiments/20260721-182712-0ba9c4: VF2 enumeration passed in 57.953 seconds total
independent_checker: checkers/known_class_embedding_pilot_audit.py imports neither enumerator, reparses graph6, validates every map and tied-row order, reconstructs pullbacks, compares exact streams, recovers historical controls, rejects mutations, and invokes independent Python and C graph checkers.

established_facts.claim: Source record 21 has exactly two induced embeddings and one unique boundary vector.
established_facts.evidence: Two exact manifests and independent replay.
established_facts.scope: Fixed core embedded into source record 21 only.

established_facts.claim: Source record 12 has exactly two induced embeddings and two unique boundary vectors.
established_facts.evidence: Two exact manifests, replay, and stored candidate recovery.
established_facts.scope: Fixed core embedded into source record 12 only.

established_facts.claim: Complement record 21 contains no induced copy of the fixed core.

ruled_out.claim_or_route: The complete-pullback mechanism is already infeasible on either named positive control.
ruled_out.scope: Records 21 and 12 under the two retained implementations.
ruled_out.reason: All positive cases completed in 3.82–26.76 seconds and below 53 MiB.
ruled_out.reopen_condition: A reproducible timing or completeness defect.

open_leads.description: Reconcile all supplied-class pullbacks over 328 source records and their complements.
open_leads.rationale: This is the first sound prerequisite for bulk supplied-class blocking.
open_leads.next_experiment: Build a checkpointed driver and submit it under the existing fail-closed gates.

open_leads.description: Use raw-origin proof-core compression if the corpus pass breaches a gate.
open_leads.rationale: It is a distinct structural route with a cheap kill condition.
open_leads.next_experiment: Deletion-minimize one raw K5-clause set and stop if it exceeds 20 clauses.

blocker: The complete 656-host pullback corpus has not been generated; worst-case embedding and tied-row multiplicities remain unknown.
reopen_condition: Not applicable; the route remains open under its full-corpus gates.
reopen_evidence: The injected class-level discriminator passed on records 21 and 12.
policy_flags: Evidence receipt creation failed; durable progress is withheld.

candidate_profile.scholarly_question: Can every supplied order-42 control compatible with one fixed core be converted into a complete replayable boundary-block corpus?
candidate_profile.meaningful_delta: Two-control exact pilot with two enumerators and a third adversarial replay checker.
candidate_profile.acceptance_test: Accept only the exact pilot counts and software; require all 656 reconciled hosts before accepting a block corpus.

closest_prior_work.difference: Prior delete/extend and common-subgraph searches did not publish this fixed-boundary pullback manifest.

novelty_searches.query: R(5,5), 656 order-42 graphs, common subgraphs, exact value
novelty_searches.finding: The maintained range remains 43–46 and the 656 graphs remain a conjectural census.

external_channel.acceptance_path: No external submission is justified for the pilot alone.

continuation.objective: Produce or fail closed on a complete two-implementation pullback corpus for all 656 host representations.
continuation.first_action: Generalize both enumerators into an atomic host-by-host checkpoint driver and submit it using /root/proof-factory/scripts/submit_lab.py.
continuation.stop_condition: Stop on stream mismatch, replay failure, per-host time at least 30 seconds, tied expansion above 100,000, or aggregate projection above 12 core-hours/20 GiB; never emit partial blocks or run residual SAT.

campaign_assessment.close_signal: Two complete 656-host streams and a third full replay under every declared limit.
campaign_assessment.reason: The cheapest feasibility gate passed and leaves one concrete certificate-oriented bulk step.

tool_disclosure: GPT-5.6 Sol was principal investigator. Supplied GPT-5.6 Terra challenger-prior-art and experiment-verification delegates were advisory and promoted with provenance; no new subagent was spawned. Sol audited the maintained survey and primary papers, wrote both enumerators and the replay checker, and ran all experiments. Tools were Python 3.12.3, NetworkX 3.3, GCC 13.3.0, exact Python/C graph checkers, jq, pdftotext, SHA-256, and the computational-researcher harness. No SAT solver, CAS, proof assistant, external publication, package installation, or system change was used.; orchestration: gpt-5.6-sol principal with gpt-5.6-terra delegates.
